title: Energy inflation in the shadow of US–China tensions: Is the energy transition a pathway to stability?
abstract: Investigates the influence of US-China tensions and energy transition on energy inflation using MMQR for 33 countries (1995-2023). Results show US-China tensions increase energy inflation across all quantiles, while energy transition mitigates it at lower and medium levels. Technology advancement and globalization reduce energy inflation across all quantiles.
notes: 核心方法: MMQR (Method of Moments Quantile Regression)
因變數：Energy Inflation (能源通膨)
自變數：US-China Tensions, Energy Transition, EG, FD, TD, UP, GLOB
美中緊張在全部quantile都顯著推升能源通膨
能源轉型在低至中quantile顯著抑制通膨
技術發展與全球化在所有quantile都降低能源成本

title: Artificial intelligence and natural resource exploitation shaping load capacity factor in Quad economies: Role of renewable energy and green innovations
authors: Yang Cui, Muhammad Usman, Muhammad Irfan, Mohammad Haseeb
abstract: Examines heterogeneous effects of AI adoption and natural resource exploitation on load capacity factor (LCF) in Quad economies (US, Japan, India, Australia) from 1995-2023 using MMQR. AI negatively impacts LCF (−0.240 to −0.305 across quantiles). Natural resources (+0.305 to +0.330), green innovation (+0.093 to +0.249), financial development (+1.033 to +1.406, strongest), and renewable energy (+0.421 to +0.764) all positively affect LCF.
notes: 核心方法: MMQR (Method of Moments Quantile Regression)
Quad四國面板 (美日印澳), 1995-2023
因變數: Load Capacity Factor (LCF) = 生物承載力/生態足跡
AI採用在所有quantile都顯著惡化LCF, 高LCF時破壞更大
自然資源開採對LCF為正向(需搭配妥善投資)
金融發展是影響LCF最強的變數
再生能源效益隨LCF水準提升而擴大

title: Asymmetric impacts of foreign direct investment, economic growth, fossil fuel dependence on renewable energy consumption in Thailand
authors: Vi Thi Nguyen, Thi Lan Anh Nguyen, Huong Giang Luong, Hoa Xuan Pham
abstract: Examines dynamic relationships among EG, FDI, fossil fuel consumption, and RE consumption in Thailand (1990-2023) using VECM + LEAP + MARKAL. RE consumption has not yet significantly influenced EG historically. FDI and FFC remain dominant drivers. Scenario simulations show targeted green FDI + efficiency-enhancing design can substantially increase renewable penetration.
notes: 分法: VECM (歷史分析) + LEAP + MARKAL (能源系統模擬至2050)
單國時間序列: 泰國 1990-2023
RE消費尚未顯著影響EG (歷史階段)
FDI和FFC仍是經濟成長主導因子
情境模擬: 綠色FDI + 系統效率提升可大幅增加再生能源滲透率
政策建議: 綠色FDI獎勵、RE基建投資、電網現代化
⚠️ 非分位數方法 — 但為同主題(能源轉型)的 complement
